steps.title: Use the data directly
steps.content: Use the two table points directly. From $(0,2)$ to $(8,34)$, the slope is $m=\frac{34-2}{8-0}=4.$ Substituting a point into $y=mx+b$ gives $b=2$.

steps.title: Check the same result by hand
steps.content: The slope is $\frac{34-2}{8-0}=\frac{32}{8}=4$. Since the point $(0,2)$ is on the graph, the y-intercept is $2$. That confirms the function is $f(x)=4x+2$.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• A) $f(x)=2x+42$: gives $f(0)=42 eq 2$. Eliminate.
  • B) $f(x)=32x+36$: gives $f(0)=36 eq 2$. Eliminate.
  • C) $f(x)=4x+2$: gives $f(0)=2$ and $f(8)=34$. Keep.
  • D) $f(x)=8x+2$: gives $f(8)=66 eq 34$. Eliminate.
That is the correct answer.
